solution.p: To use the quadratic formula, we identify a=1\text{,} b=2.7\text{,} and c=-0.7\text{.}

The solution set is approximately {\left\{-2.93824,0.238238\right\}}\text{.} Note that since we started with decimal coefficients, we felt it was acceptible to round the solutions to decimal approximations rather than keep to the exact solutions.
